Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.query_id AS %1, r.query_text_id AS %2, r.context_settings_id AS %3, r.object_id AS %4, r.batch_sql_handle AS %5, r.query_hash AS %6, r.is_internal_query AS %7, r.query_parameterization_type AS %8, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.query_parameterization_type_desc) AS %9, r.initial_compile_start_time AS %10, r.last_compile_start_time AS %11, r.last_execution_time AS %12, r.last_compile_batch_sql_handle AS %13, r.last_compile_batch_offset_start AS %14, r.last_compile_batch_offset_end AS %15, r.count_compiles AS %16, r.avg_compile_duration AS %17, r.last_compile_duration AS %18, r.avg_bind_duration AS %19, r.last_bind_duration AS %20, r.avg_bind_cpu_time AS %21, r.last_bind_cpu_time AS %22, r.avg_optimize_duration AS %23, r.last_optimize_duration AS %24, r.avg_optimize_cpu_time AS %25, r.last_optimize_cpu_time AS %26, r.avg_compile_memory_kb AS %27, r.last_compile_memory_kb AS %28, r.max_compile_memory_kb AS %29, r.is_clouddb_internal_query AS %30, 1010 AS %31 FROM sys.query_store_query r", asQueryId, asQueryTextId, asContextSettingsId, asObjectId, asBatchSqlHandle, asQueryHash, asIsInternalQuery, asQueryParameterizationType, asQueryParameterizationTypeDesc, asInitialCompileStartTime, asLastCompileStartTime, asLastExecutionTime, asLastCompileBatchSqlHandle, asLastCompileBatchOffsetStart, asLastCompileBatchOffsetEnd, asCountCompiles, asAvgCompileDuration, asLastCompileDuration, asAvgBindDuration, asLastBindDuration, asAvgBindCpuTime, asLastBindCpuTime, asAvgOptimizeDuration, asLastOptimizeDuration, asAvgOptimizeCpuTime, asLastOptimizeCpuTime, asAvgCompileMemoryKb, asLastCompileMemoryKb, asMaxCompileMemoryKb, asIsClouddbInternalQuery, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: initialize
construct
